info.title: trstrip
info.description:
Copyright (c) 2023 Ken Domino
# trstrip
## Summary
Strip a grammar of all actions, labels, etc.
## Description
Read the parse tree data from stdin and strip the grammar
of all comments, labels, and action blocks.
## Usage
trstrip
## Examples
trparse A.g4 | trstrip
## Current version
0.22.0 Add trdot. Update to Antlr 4.13.1 and Dotnet 8.0.

--fmt            Output formatted parsing results set.
-v, --verbose
